channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Humana Bolsters CenterWell Primary Care With Another Deal
item.description: Humana’s fast-growing CenterWell healthcare services business added another network of senior primary care centers with the acquisition of Florida-bas...

item.title: Candles and tablecloth at White Castle: How a Valentine’s Day tradition sprouted over 30 years ago and spread nationwide
item.description: The "fun and quirky" promotion started in 1991 and was only offered at White Castles in St. Louis and Minneapolis.

item.title: Living alone? The 'singles tax' that costs $10K a year
item.description: Living alone costs Americans over $10,000 extra per year in what experts call a "singles tax," as apartment rents surge nationwide, new data reveals.

item.title: A U.S. ‘debt spiral’ could start in coming years when the interest rate on government borrowing exceeds economic growth, budget watchdog says
item.description: CRFB warned the actual fiscal outlook could be far worse than even the latest sobering projections.

item.title: How GLP-1 Weight Loss Drugs Have Revolutionized Obesity- Lessons Learned
item.description: A public health expert explains how GLP-1 drugs have changed the way healthcare providers understand and treat obesity.

item.title: When Patients Win, Hospitals Lose
item.description: Hospitals and health systems have been operating with a broken business model for decades. It’s time for a moral reckoning on the subject.

item.title: Americans wake up and smell the coffee price surge—skipping Starbucks, brewing at home, and drinking Diet Coke for caffeine
item.description: Coffee prices in the U.S. were up 18.3% in January from a year ago. Over five years, coffee prices rose 47%.

item.title: Gen Z’s latest revolt over Jeffrey Epstein: pointing out a connection to the company that takes class photos
item.description: Some school districts are cancelling school photos as the company, Lifetouch, called the claims “completely false.”

item.title: Will LLMs Become Obsolete?
item.description: Description: Experts argue LLMs won’t be the end-state: new architectures (multimodal, agentic, beyond transformers) will supersede them.

item.title: Victorian-era ‘vinegar valentines’ show that trolling existed long before social media or the internet
item.description: In 1885, a resident of Birmingham, UK, was charged with the attempted murder of his estranged wife after he received a vinegar valentine from her.

item.title: iPhone 18 Pro Tipped For Game-Changing Satellite 5G: No More Dead Zones?
item.description: This year’s iPhones could see a signal boost like no other, with 5G satellite connectivity predicted in the latest report.

item.title: Tax refunds are up this year, early IRS numbers show. See how yours compares.
How a riptide around AI and stocks could affect Fed decisions and housing market
You can now use buy-now-pay-later to pay your rent — but watch out for the fees
These ‘safer’ chip stocks have boomed this year. Is it too late to buy in?
Who needs chocolates? Vacuums and car tires are the new Valentine's Day treats.
SpaceX launches crew to International Space Station after prior team's medical evacuation
item.description: SpaceX and NASA launched a new crew to the International Space Station on Friday, around one month after a previous crew had to be brought home early.

item.title: Inflation eased slightly in January but remained well above the Fed's target
item.description: The Labor Department on Friday released the January 2026 consumer price index (CPI), which showed that inflation remained elevated above the Federal R...

item.title: Gas prices fall in January, giving Americans a break at the pump
item.description: Gas prices dropped 7.5% over the past year, bringing welcome relief to American consumers as inflation data shows energy costs declining nationwide.

item.title: Mortgage rates edge lower, hover near 6%
item.description: The average rate on a 30-year fixed mortgage slipped this week to 6.09%, according to the latest Freddie Mac data released Thursday. That is down from...

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
